title: Plants vs. Minecraft
body:
Plants vs. Minecraft is a PvZ (Plants vs. Zombies) themed mod aimed to recreate the Tower Defense games' experience in Minecraft!

Craft seed packets, find different structures, fight zombies and travel to the Time Twister dimension!

![Front Lawn](https://i.imgur.com/82IvSTT.png)

# Plants

There are 50 plants in the mod. Each can be crafted with seed packets and materials. They attack zombies automatically, protect the player from zombies or support you in your journey through the undead hoards.

![Mushroom Garden](https://i.imgur.com/rITHuK5.png)

# Zombies

There are 52 zombies is the mod. They spawn like regular mobs but stay during the day, attack you and plants, and can drop various useful armor, equipment and more.

![Dark Ages](https://i.imgur.com/3b1bNq4.png)

# Time Twister

A new dimension featuring the non-Modern Day worlds of PvZ2, each having unique zombies spawn and structures, some hidden treasures around as well, create a portal using the Time Twisting Taco!

![Jurassic Marsh](https://i.imgur.com/SCcLhF4.png)

# Crazy Dave

Your next door neighbour spawning in his car, you can trade with him using random items to get equipment, food and more.

![Crazy Dave](https://i.imgur.com/WL0wNl5.png)

# Music Disc

There are a lot of new Music Disc featuring songs from PvZ games, try finding them all!

![Some Music Discs](https://i.imgur.com/pJ82S8E.png)

All rights of the PvZ franchise, including music goes to EA and PopCap.

(Made with MCreator)
